message:
fix(telemetry): add recursion depth limit to redact_sensitive to prevent stack overflow

Add MAX_REDACTION_DEPTH (128) guard to the recursive JSON redaction function.
Deeply nested JSON payloads (e.g., from malformed connector responses or
recursive serialization bugs) could previously cause unbounded recursion and
stack overflow. Values beyond the depth limit are replaced with
"[MAX_DEPTH_EXCEEDED]" to fail safely while still signaling the truncation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
